title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at CONCOR - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at CONCOR - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the CONCOR family as a Distribution Manager in Chandigarh. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About CONCOR:
CONCOR is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CONCOR!
